THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT METZE, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1670 MCALLISTER STREET #3, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $1,416.68 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,816.68, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY WRIT HAS NOT BEEN EXECUTED, CALENDAR OF DEC-15-1994, DENIED CONSIDERING THE PAPERS, ARGUMENTS AND EVIDENCE, THE PLAINTIF REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS INCLUDING RENT LOSS, COST OF SECURITY GUARDS, COURT COSTS AND ATTY FEES AGAINST THE SHERIFF FOR FAILURE TO INITIALLY ENFORCE A WRIT OF POSSESSION AGAINST THE DEFENDANT IN THIS CASE IS DENIED.(PLS SEE MINUTE ORDER).
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAUCER, MARYLYN AS TO DEFENDANT METZE, JAMES DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED

JUDGE JAMES MCKECHNIE, REPORTER MARCIA HOLMES, CLERK V.DAVIS 10:30AM C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF BY ARNOLD EVJE. PLAINTIFF WITNESS ROBERT ROLAND ( PROPERTY MANAGER) SWORN AND EXAMINED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT #1 LEASE FOR ID JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES LOCA- TED AT 1670 MCALLISTER STREET #3, SAN FRANCISCO, RENT AND DAMAGES OF $1416.68, $400 ATTY FEES, COST PER COST BILL PLAINTIFF PREPARED JUDGMENT.
